summary: A full Phase 2 smoke run succeeds against a real backfilled run, with audit samples and a persisted demo log for dashboard review.

checks.name: CHECK-01: End-to-end labeling + filtered themes flow
checks.expected: Script exits 0 and returns summary/themes/audit payload
checks.actual: Smoke script exited successfully and produced DONE summary plus all 3 audience filter payloads

checks.name: CHECK-02: Backfill old run succeeds
checks.actual: run-755de99fc7 summary is DONE with 77/77 labeled

checks.name: CHECK-03: Audit sample exposes label reason
checks.expected: Records include label metadata and reason
checks.actual: Audit sample includes community_admin / seller_affiliate labels and label_reason values such as admin_or_group_rule_markers_detected and promotion_markers_detected

checks.name: CHECK-04: No crash after final rebuild
CHECK-05: Demo log written
checks.expected: Demo log exists with labeling and themes summary
checks.actual: DEMO_LOG.md records run_id, label_job_id, role counts, 3 audience presets, and audit sample rows
